description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving unit constructed primarily from dark wood with a rich, visible grain pattern. The structure features two open shelves and a flat top surface, providing ample space for storage or display. The top surface appears to be made of a transparent or frosted glass panel, adding a contemporary touch and visual lightness to the design. The sides and back are solid wood, while the front and shelf areas are open, allowing easy access to stored items. The overall build is robust and boxy, with clean, straight lines and no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark wood shelving unit with two open shelves and a glass top, featuring a clean, boxy design. The front and shelves are open for easy access and display.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and the glass top, with the full width of the unit visible.
description_view_1: Angled side-front view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wood panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Angled side-front view from the opposite side, again showing the open shelves and glass top.
